name: Understanding Weights in Merchandising Cloud
body:
[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Weights","bold":true},{"text":" feature in Merchandising Cloud (Findify) controls how different fields in your catalog are prioritised when customers use "},{"text":"search or autocomplete","bold":true},{"text":". By assigning weights, merchants can influence which fields are considered more important when a search term matches product data."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview of Weights"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"A "},{"text":"weight","bold":true},{"text":" is a numeric value that determines the "},{"text":"relative importance of a field in Search","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Values can range from "},{"text":"1 to infinity","bold":true},{"text":", with higher numbers making the field more important in ranking."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"If a search term matches multiple fields (e.g., both Title and Description), the field with the "},{"text":"higher weight","bold":true},{"text":" will have more influence on the search results."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"
To access and set weights for categories; go to "},{"text":"Settings > Primary Setup > Filtering > Pencil icon ","bold":true},{"text":"of the category to set weight."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/2OA1VQGRYA4O/mhc1.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/2OA1VQGRYA4O/mhc1.png","name":"mhc1.png","type":"image/png","size":661942,"width":2560,"height":1326,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":742,"dateInserted":"2025-09-29T09:41:46+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"How Weights Influence Search"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When a shopper enters a search term, the system matches it against the product data in your catalog. Each field (Title, Description, Brand, etc.) has a "},{"text":"default weight","bold":true},{"text":" that influences ranking."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Example:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"“Shirt” matches the "},{"text":"Title","bold":true},{"text":" field → shown higher (Title has higher weight)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"“Shirt” matches the "},{"text":"Description","bold":true},{"text":" field → shown lower (Description has lower weight)."}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"As a merchant, you can:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Increase weight","bold":true},{"text":" on important fields like Title, Brand, or SKU."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Lower weight","bold":true},{"text":" or disable fields that should have less influence."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Toggle fields on/off","bold":true},{"text":" to decide whether they are searchable or suggestable at all."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Weights affect "},{"text":"search ranking and autocomplete relevance only","bold":true},{"text":". They do "},{"text":"not control the order of filters","bold":true},{"text":" in the storefront. The order of filters is defined by how fields are arranged in the "},{"text":"Search configuration","bold":true},{"text":" by the user. 
"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Example:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"“Discount” filter has weight "},{"text":"2","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"“New Arrival” filter has weight "},{"text":"1","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"In this case, “Discount” will appear before “New Arrival” in search suggestions."}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This ensures that the fields you want to highlight receive more visibility without excluding other options. "},{"text":"Weights let you rank what matters most.","bold":true},{"text":" Use them to guide shoppers toward the right products, without hiding other options.

"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Best Practices for Using Weights"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Use gradual increments","bold":true},{"text":" instead of extreme jumps. Example: 1 → 2 → 3 instead of 1 → 100."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Adjust based on analytics","bold":true},{"text":" to align with how customers typically search or filter products."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Prioritise key fields","bold":true},{"text":" like Title, Brand, or SKU, since they are most relevant to customer intent."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Turn off fields","bold":true},{"text":" that aren’t useful for search (e.g., internal notes)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Remember:","bold":true},{"text":" Weights don’t affect filter order — only search ranking.
"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Weights feature provides merchants with a way to fine-tune search relevance and guide shoppers toward the most impactful criteria. By assigning meaningful weight values, you can balance "},{"text":"business priorities","bold":true},{"text":" with "},{"text":"customer discovery","bold":true},{"text":", ensuring search and suggestions support both revenue goals and user experience."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/Y3MBU059CNDV/mhc-2.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/Y3MBU059CNDV/mhc-2.png","name":"mhc-2.png","type":"image/png","size":1144882,"width":2560,"height":1441,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":743,"dateInserted":"2025-09-29T09:42:06+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Related Settings in the Filter Popup"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Along with weight, you can also configure how each filter interacts with search:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Allow to filter by this field","bold":true},{"text":" – Makes the field available as a customer-facing filter."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Return in autocomplete response","bold":true},{"text":" – Ensures this field is included in the "},{"text":"API response for autocomplete","bold":true},{"text":" queries. (without it enabled, the field cannot be used to power autocomplete results)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Allow to search by this field","bold":true},{"text":" – Lets the field influence search ranking."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Use this field for search suggestions","bold":true},{"text":" – Helps refine predictive search."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Return in response per variant","bold":true},{"text":" – Useful if variant-level data should affect the results"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
